'''Control''' was the name of the second-in-command of the [[Cavrilhu Pirates|Cavrilhu pirate gang]], under [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Zothip]].

==Biography==
Control secretly hated Zothip and felt as if he was the one doing all the work without getting the perks, so he manipulated his leader into confronting [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Vilim Disra]] in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]. Control and several other [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], including [[Crans]], [[Grinner]], and [[Portin]], were with Zothip shortly before the meeting with Disra in Disra's quarters on the Imperial Capital of [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]]. They did not realize that they were being followed by a [[Mistryl Shadow Guard]] [[Karoly D'ulin]]. During the meeting with Disra, Karoly killed Zothip. Following Zothip's [[Death/Legends|death]], Control became the head of the Cavrilhu Pirates.
